description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring six elegantly curved metal arms radiating from a central cylindrical hub. The central hub and the vertical stem are finished in a polished gold color, while the arms are a contrasting metallic silver or chrome. Each arm supports a candle-like bulb holder with a small, round, gold-toned plate beneath the bulb, evoking a classic candelabra appearance. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling by a chain composed of hexagonal links, also in gold, adding to its decorative appeal. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with a blend of traditional and modern metallic finishes. The sconce is designed to provide ambient lighting in upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, restaurants, or historic buildings.
description: A gold and silver chandelier-style sconce with six curved arms, candle-like bulbs, and a decorative hexagonal chain for ceiling suspension.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms symmetrically spread, with the gold central hub and chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the profile of the gold hub and chain.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all six arms and the gold-silver color contrast visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the arm curvature and the vertical alignment of the chain and hub.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage chandelier design with a blend of gold and silver finishes, featuring elegantly curved arms and a decorative hexagonal chain. Its style is reminiscent of classic European candelabras with a touch of modern metallic flair.
